title: Intellia Therapeutics (NTLA) Earnings Dates and Report Forecasts
text: Intellia Therapeutics earnings calendar and forecasts show upcoming reporting dates and analyst consensus estimates. For Q1 2022, the consensus EPS estimate was -$1.11 and the consensus revenue estimate was $8.57M. Over that year, NTLA had beaten EPS estimates 25% of the time and beaten revenue estimates 50% of the time. Historical analysis shows NTLA's earnings date for Q3 2022 was scheduled for Wednesday, November 2, 2022, for the fiscal quarter ending September 30, 2022. For that quarter, analysts estimated an average EPS of -$1.31, with revenue estimation of $9.84M. The company has consistently reported quarterly financial results with evolving analyst expectations as clinical programs progress.
